title: Dekton Bolt Cutter 14"-Heavy Duty Cr-mo Steel| Fitted Anti-slip Rubber Grips| Adjustment Screw For Edge Alignment| Shock Absorber| Durable And Powerful Cutter| Ideal For Industrial, Construction, Home
features: Heavy-Duty Construction: The Dekton 14" Bolt Cutter is engineered from premium CR-MO steel, renowned for its exceptional hardness and durability. This heavy-duty design ensures that the cutter can handle tough cutting tasks with ease, making it ideal for industrial, construction, and home use.

Powerful Cutting Performance: Equipped with precision-ground cutting edges, this bolt cutter delivers powerful performance, effortlessly cutting through various materials such as bolts, chains, and wire. Its robust construction allows it to handle demanding tasks, providing reliable and consistent cutting power.

Anti-Slip Rubber Grips: Dekton Bolt Cutter The bolt cutter features fitted anti-slip rubber grips, designed for maximum comfort and control. These ergonomic handles reduce hand fatigue during extended use and ensure a secure grip, even in wet or slippery conditions.

Adjustable Edge Alignment: An integrated adjustment screw allows for precise edge alignment, ensuring optimal cutting performance and extended tool life. This feature helps maintain the accuracy of each cut, reducing the need for frequent adjustments and enhancing overall efficiency.

Shock Absorber for Enhanced Comfort: The built-in shock absorber minimizes the impact on your hands and arms during operation. This innovative feature reduces vibration and stress, providing a more comfortable cutting experience and improving overall handling.
description: Product Description Introducing the Dekton Bolt Cutter 14" – a heavy-duty tool designed to deliver exceptional cutting power and durability. Engineered from premium Cr-Mo steel, this robust bolt cutter ensures long-lasting performance and reliability even under the most demanding conditions. The 14" length provides ample leverage for cutting through tough materials with ease, making it an ideal choice for industrial, construction, and home use. Equipped with anti-slip rubber grips, this bolt cutter offers superior comfort and control, allowing for precise cuts without the risk of slipping. The ergonomic design helps reduce hand fatigue, enabling you to work efficiently for extended periods. For added convenience, the cutter features an adjustment screw that allows for fine-tuning of the edge alignment, ensuring clean and accurate cuts every time. The Dekton Bolt Cutter is also fitted with a shock absorber to minimize impact and reduce strain on your hands, providing a smoother cutting experience. This feature is particularly beneficial during repetitive cutting tasks, enhancing overall ease of use and safety. Whether you’re tackling heavy-duty projects or routine maintenance, this cutter’s combination of durability and power makes it a reliable tool for a wide range of applications. Designed with industrial-grade standards, the Dekton Bolt Cutter excels in cutting through metal rods, chains, and bolts with minimal effort. Its heavy-duty construction and thoughtful design features make it a valuable addition to any toolkit. Box Contains 1 x 14" bolt cutter
